title: Tip of the week #18: Board ownership—what is a board owner?

posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
A board owner is either:

  1. The person who created the board or;
  2. Subscribers to the board that the board creator has chosen to be co-owners of. Only the initial owner of the board and the account admins can add other owners to the board.

The board owner can change the board type, set restrictions on boards and change the board owner (a helpful feature if your board owner is leaving the team and needs to hand the reins to somebody else).
